design_language.composition_style: Split layout — text-heavy top, image-dominant bottom
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Headline first, subheadline second, product image third

color_logic.color_strategy: Black background creates luxury and drama; gold signals premium quality; white ensures readability

typography.headline_font_style: Large serif or bold sans-serif, mixed weight
typography.subheadline_style: Medium sans-serif, gold colored for emphasis
typography.font_weight_variation: Heavy on key location word, lighter on descriptors

text_placement.layering: Text sits above image, not overlaid on face

image_placement.crop_style: Extreme close-up crop of eyes and brows, cut off at forehead
image_placement.subject: Close-up of woman's eyes with defined brows and lashes

message_delivery.strategy: Lead with location + service, support with aspirational benefit, close with dramatic visual proof
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — visual result speaks as CTA

design_language.composition_style: Mixed grid — persona on right, text left, result thumbnails bottom center
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Brand logo top, headline, offer badge, bullet list, instructor photo, result images, CTA banner

color_logic.accent_color_1: Red (#CC0000 range) — used for urgency badges and CTA
color_logic.color_strategy: Neutral background keeps focus on content; red creates urgency and draws eye to key offers; white containers organize information clearly

typography.badge_text_style: Bold white text on red pill/rounded rectangle
typography.cta_banner_style: Bold white text on red background
typography.font_weight_variation: High contrast between headline (heavy) and body (regular)
typography.text_alignment: Left-aligned for lists, center for headline and CTA

text_placement.position: Top section headline, left-center body text, bottom banner CTA
text_placement.alignment: Left-aligned body, center-aligned headline and CTA
text_placement.layering: Text on white background panels, not overlaid on images

image_placement.instructor_photo: Right side, full height, professional headshot style with blazer
image_placement.result_thumbnails: Bottom center, three circular cropped close-up brow/eye images
image_placement.framing: Circular masks for result photos, rectangular full bleed for instructor

message_delivery.strategy: Lead with authority (instructor photo), enumerate benefits, signal credibility, close with financial incentive
message_delivery.cta_style: Explicit promotional CTA at bottom — financing offer

design_language.composition_style: Full bleed group photo as background, text overlaid on top and bottom left
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Large number/day callout first, training title, CTA button style text, then bullet list

color_logic.overlay: Semi-transparent dark overlay on bottom-left text area
color_logic.color_strategy: Gold maintains brand consistency with beauty/luxury codes; authentic photo builds social proof; dark overlay ensures text legibility over photo

typography.headline_font_style: Very large bold sans-serif for day number

text_placement.position: Top-left for headline, left-center for body, bottom-left for contact info
text_placement.layering: Text overlaid directly on group photo with partial dark overlay

image_placement.main_image: Full bleed background — real classroom group photo
image_placement.result_thumbnails: Top right corner — three circular cropped close-ups of brow/lip/eye results
image_placement.framing: Circular masks for result images; group photo fills entire canvas

message_delivery.strategy: Social proof via group photo (many students = credibility), quick scannable list of techniques, urgency via direct CTA

design_language.aesthetic: Warm neutral tones, polished and approachable
design_language.composition_style: Instructor right, city skyline background, text left, result circles bottom-left
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Header banner, headline, date/schedule, bullet list, result thumbnails

color_logic.primary_background: Blurred city skyline (muted warm grey/beige tones)
color_logic.accent_color: None strong — relies on tone contrast
color_logic.color_strategy: Warm neutral palette communicates sophistication and femininity; city background implies prestige and location; no harsh colors keeps it aspirational and approachable

typography.header_banner_text: White bold all-caps on dusty pink strip
typography.font_weight_variation: High contrast between feature text (bold) and supporting details (regular)
typography.text_alignment: Left-aligned for body, center for header banner

text_placement.position: Top header banner full width, left-center for all body text
text_placement.layering: Text sits on semi-transparent white/light background panel over skyline

image_placement.instructor_photo: Right side, full height cutout, professional business casual attire
image_placement.result_thumbnails: Bottom-left, two overlapping circular close-up images (brow and lip)
image_placement.framing: Circular masks for result images; instructor photo cutout with no background

message_delivery.strategy: Location prestige (Atlanta skyline), instructor authority, specific dates create urgency, benefit list builds value
message_delivery.emotional_hook: Career transformation, professional credibility, specific opportunity

design_language.composition_style: Dark text block top, large portrait photo bottom
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Location callout, benefit statement, dramatic portrait, brand logo

color_logic.color_strategy: Black and gold is a classic luxury pairing; creates premium brand feel; warm portrait photo provides contrast and draws the eye naturally

typography.headline_font_style: Large serif-influenced or elegant bold font, gold colored
typography.bold_emphasis: Key word 'brows' bolded within body copy
typography.brand_logo_style: Small elegant serif logo bottom right

text_placement.position: Top ~35% of creative in black band
text_placement.layering: Text isolated in solid black zone, not overlaid on image

image_placement.main_image: Bottom ~65% — large close-up portrait of woman mid-procedure (gloved hand near brow)
image_placement.crop_style: Face fills frame, slightly angled, natural lighting
image_placement.framing: Full bleed, no borders or masks

message_delivery.strategy: Premium brand positioning + aspirational lifestyle benefit + real service moment shown
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — brand logo as identifier, no hard CTA
message_delivery.emotional_hook: Waking up beautiful effortlessly — daily luxury

design_language.aesthetic: Professional beauty editorial meets local service ad
design_language.composition_style: Text top on black, procedure close-up photo bottom
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Location headline, benefit subhead, dramatic procedure image

color_logic.image_tones: Dark, moody with skin tones and black gloves
color_logic.color_strategy: Identical color logic to Ad 1 — black/gold/white trio signals premium; dark procedure image adds drama and professional credibility

typography.headline_font_style: Large bold mixed-weight sans-serif, gold/white split
typography.subheadline_style: Medium gold for lead-in phrase, white for main copy

text_placement.layering: Text completely separated from image in black area

image_placement.main_image: Bottom ~60% — close-up of microblading procedure in progress
image_placement.crop_style: Extreme close-up, technician's gloved hands visible with tool
image_placement.framing: Full bleed, no masks or borders

message_delivery.strategy: Mirror of Ad 1 template — location targeting + emotional benefit + procedural proof
message_delivery.cta_style: Implicit — visual process shot builds trust
message_delivery.emotional_hook: Waking up effortlessly beautiful, no makeup needed

design_language.composition_style: 2x2 photo grid collage, no design framing or text
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Results speak entirely — no text hierarchy, purely visual

color_logic.image_tones: Warm brown and terracotta skin tones, natural lighting
color_logic.color_strategy: No designed color — authenticity is the strategy; warm skin tones feel relatable and real; no borders or design elements signal genuine client photos

typography.brand_watermark: Small script/cursive font watermark in center

text_placement.position: Only a small brand watermark in center of the grid

image_placement.layout: Equal 2x2 grid — four photos of equal size
image_placement.subject: Multiple before/after brow results on Black women models
image_placement.crop_style: Close-up face shots and extreme brow close-ups mixed
image_placement.framing: Tight grid with minimal or no gutters

message_delivery.strategy: Pure social proof — let results do all the talking; diverse representation builds relatability
message_delivery.cta_style: None explicit — results are the CTA
message_delivery.emotional_hook: Real results on real people = 'this could be me'

ad_creatives_analysis.advertiser_type: Local Brow & Lash Bar (iBrow iLash Bar)

design_language.composition_style: Three horizontal strip photos stacked, brand name and CTA below on white
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Photo strips (results) first, brand name second, promotional CTA third

color_logic.image_tones: Natural neutral beauty tones, blue eyes
color_logic.color_strategy: Pink palette is universally associated with feminine beauty; soft background feels approachable vs. luxury black; pink brand name reinforces playful identity

typography.cta_text_style: Smaller italic pink sans-serif or script

text_placement.position: Bottom ~25% — brand name and CTA text on pink background below photo strips
text_placement.layering: Text on clean background, not overlaid on images

image_placement.layout: Three horizontal landscape-cropped strips stacked vertically
image_placement.subject: Progressive brow transformation — different stages of brow definition
image_placement.framing: No borders — strips flow into each other

message_delivery.strategy: Show transformation journey through stacked progression, invite action with soft promotional language
message_delivery.cta_style: Soft invitation ('Ask about our grand opening specials')
message_delivery.emotional_hook: Transformation journey, feminine identity, new beginning (grand opening)

ad_creatives_analysis.advertiser_type: Permanent Makeup Studio (Nirvana Beauty Lounge) — Before/After

design_language.composition_style: Two equal horizontal panels stacked — before (top) and after (bottom) with label
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Label text on image, photo comparison, brand logo bottom right

color_logic.primary_background: Clean white/neutral — photos fill most of frame
color_logic.image_tones: Natural skin tones, clean studio lighting
color_logic.color_strategy: Clinical white space signals professionalism and hygiene; teal brand accent is calming and spa-like; minimal color design keeps focus entirely on the result comparison

typography.label_style: Simple clean sans-serif, left-aligned within each panel
typography.font_weight: Regular to medium weight — not aggressive

text_placement.position: Labels top-left of each photo panel, brand logo bottom-right

image_placement.layout: 50/50 horizontal split — before top, after bottom
image_placement.subject: Same model's eyes shown in two states — with makeup vs. permanent brows
image_placement.crop_style: Wide close-up of eyes and brows, same angle for both panels

message_delivery.strategy: Direct visual comparison eliminates need for persuasion — result is self-evident; clinical cleanliness builds trust
message_delivery.cta_style: None — brand logo as identifier only
message_delivery.emotional_hook: Objective proof of transformation, clarity of benefit

ad_creatives_analysis.advertiser_type: Permanent Makeup Studio (Nirvana Beauty Lounge) — Close-up Result

design_language.composition_style: Single full-bleed extreme close-up photo with only brand logo
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Image dominates entirely, brand logo is the only non-image element

color_logic.image_tones: Warm neutral skin tones, clean bright lighting
color_logic.color_strategy: Zero design color — photo quality and result carry all weight; teal logo provides subtle brand identification without competing

typography.brand_logo_style: Small elegant serif text + lotus icon in teal/white

image_placement.subject: Extreme close-up of one eye with perfectly shaped dark brow
image_placement.crop_style: Macro beauty photography style — fills entire canvas
image_placement.framing: No borders, no masks — pure image

message_delivery.strategy: Let the work speak entirely — highest confidence signal; portfolio-grade image quality implies expert craftsmanship
message_delivery.emotional_hook: Aspirational beauty perfection, desire for the result

common_image_strategies: Extreme close-up of eyes and brows as hero image
Circular cropped thumbnails for result showcases
Instructor/expert persona photo for training ads
Full-bleed authentic group photos for training social proof
UGC-style collage grids for service ads
typography_patterns: Location name prominently bolded or colored differently
Mixed font weights within single headline for emphasis
Gold/yellow used consistently for premium headline text
Red used for urgency and promotional callouts
Script fonts signal femininity and boutique identity
layout_archetypes: Full bleed photo with text overlay
message_delivery_frameworks: Location targeting + benefit + visual proof (service ads)
Authority figure + curriculum list + financial CTA (training ads)
Pure visual social proof with no copy (UGC/portfolio ads)
Before/after comparison with minimal copy (transformation ads)
